Research Paper
Deep Dive

LoRA: Low-Rank Adaptation of LLMs (Hu et al., 2021)
The original paper. Sections 2–4 explain the math clearly. Key figures: 1 (architecture), 4 (memory savings).
★ Foundational — read Section 4 for the rank analysis.

📄


Research Paper
Deep Dive

QLoRA: Efficient Fine-Tuning of Quantized LLMs (Dettmers 2023)
The QLoRA paper. Section 3 explains NF4, double quantisation, and paged optimisers. Required reading.
★ Read the abstract + Section 3 before training.
